resourcepack.mossfix.spread_cobbles.desc: Allows moss to spread on all kinds of cobblestone. I don't love that it's mossy cobblestone but whatever.
resourcepack.mossfix.spread_sands.descri: Allows moss to spread on all kinds of sand. I don't like that it may spread over suspicious blocks.
resourcepack.mossfix.spread_sands: Spread Moss Over Sand and Gravel
